description_long: This is a dark-colored bottle with a cylindrical body that tapers into a narrower neck and a small, slightly raised lip at the opening. The bottle appears to be made of a solid, opaque material, likely glass, with a smooth and hard surface finish. Its body is robust and rounded, providing a stable base, while the neck is elongated and gently transitions from the main body. There are no visible labels, logos, or decorative elements on the exterior, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The cap area is integrated into the neck, suggesting a simple closure mechanism, possibly a crown or snap-on cap. The bottle is entirely opaque, and there are no visible contents or signs of wear or damage.
description: A dark, opaque bottle with a smooth, rounded body and a narrow neck, made of hard material and lacking any visible labels or decorations.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bottle, highlighting its cylindrical body and tapered neck.
description_view_1: Front view focusing on the bottle's opening and neck, with the circular mouth clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the bottle's elongated profile and smooth surface.
description_view_3: Bottom view showing the rounded base of the bottle, emphasizing its stability and lack of markings.
